title: Kitchen Academy Induction Hob Pots and Pans Set - 12 Piece Cooking Pans Set, Black Granite Kitchen Cookware Set,Nonstick Saucepan Set PFOS & PFOA Free
features: 🔥Induction Kitchen Cookware Set 12 Piece - Include 20cm fry pan/ 28cm fry pan / 24cm Deep Fry Pan with lid / 1.5Q saucepan with lid / 3Q casserole with lid / 5Q casserole with lid / 2 pcs silicone utensils. Easy Clean & hand wash recommend!
🔥Eco-friendly Granite Coating - Nonstick black granite material with 100% free of PFOS, PFOA, lead and cadmium, which ensures that your daily cooking is always safer and healthier.

🔥Heat Up Quickly and Evenly - The induction saucepans set adopts large stainless steel magnetized base and provides a larger heating area, which allow to distribute heat quickly and evenly resulting in no hot spots. Suitable for gas, electric, ceramic, glass, halogen and induction hobs.

🔥Granite Cookware Set with Bakelite Handle - Bakelite is used because it has heat-resistant properties and is an electrical insulator. Bakelite would not burn when exposed to high heat. Bakelite is safe up to 350 degrees F, for a limited time. Dark bakelite handle is more stain-resistant and easy to clean too.

🔥Great Quality & Service - Quality first, Service Utmost. All cookware sets purchased have a 365 Days warranty as standard. If you meet any problems, don't hesitate to contact our 24/7 online customer service which will reply to you ASAP to help with your worries.
